tests.summary: Cart: add to cart updates badge
tests.precondition: User is on the Home page (`/`); cart is empty (navbar badge at 0 or hidden).

steps.action: Click [data-test=add-to-cart-{id}] for a product (e.g. Claw Hammer).

tests.summary: Cart: increase quantity updates line total
tests.precondition: Cart contains Claw Hammer ($12.00) at qty 1, on /cart.

steps.expectedResult: Line total = $24.00 (unit price x2); [data-test=cart-subtotal] updates to match.

tests.summary: Cart: decrease quantity updates line total
tests.precondition: Cart contains Claw Hammer at qty 2, on /cart.
Cart contains at least one item, on /cart.

steps.expectedResult: Badge count decreases by the removed item's quantity; subtotal/total recalculate excluding the removed item.

tests.summary: Cart: apply valid coupon TEST10 shows discount
tests.precondition: Cart has items totaling $12.00 subtotal, no coupon applied, on /cart.

steps.expectedResult: [data-test=coupon-message] shows a success message; [data-test=cart-discount] displays "-$1.20" (10% of $12.00, per VALID_COUPONS).

tests.summary: Cart: apply invalid coupon shows error and removes discount
tests.precondition: Cart has items with TEST10 already applied (discount showing), on /cart.

steps.expectedResult: Discount line is removed/zeroed; cart-total reverts to the undiscounted subtotal.
